introSection: ISpeed is a steel launched roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. The ride was built by Intamin and opened on 20 May 2009. It replaced Sierra Tonante, a wooden roller coaster designed by William Cobb that operated from 1992 to 2007.
fullText: ISpeed is a steel launched roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. The ride was built by Intamin and opened on 20 May 2009. It replaced Sierra Tonante, a wooden roller coaster designed by William Cobb that operated from 1992 to 2007.
